audit_items.proof_trace: balances[msg.sender] is mutated AFTER msg.sender.transfer(amount); a malicious receiver contract can re-enter withdraw() before the bookkeeping update lands.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker deploys a contract whose receive() calls Vault.withdraw again; first call sends ETH, fallback re-enters and the check `balances[msg.sender] >= amount` still holds because the decrement has not happened yet.
